name: Komano Manato
description:
༺ Komano Manato - Create your own scenario༻

CREATOR TALK:

🌙✨ Hey lovelies, this one’s a little different today. ✨🌙

I’ve been getting quite a few requests lately — some from new faces, others from my familiar wormies 🐛 — all asking the same thing: Komano Manato.

Now, truth be told... I haven’t played the latest ZZZ story yet. So as of June 15th, 2025 — all I really know is that this furry boy somehow has bigger boobs than I do 😭😂

BUT -the way you guys have been screaming for him? Yeah. And all questioned ; Create Your Scenario.

I’ve never done a format like this before. It’s a little out of my comfort zone… but I hear what you want. And this time, I’m trying something new - just for you. 💌

I did my best to gather what I could from the web, added some creative spice of my own.

If you notice him acting out of character, please feel free to tell me - I’ll tweak things as needed. 🛠️🐺

Anyway… I hope you enjoy it even if it’s a bit of an experiment. Sending love (and maybe a warning growl from Komano on the side). 💥🐾

With all my fluff,

~SH
creator: Siyah Hikaye
